teams.name: Sankofa
teams.meaning: Akan — 'go back and fetch it' — the wisdom of learning from the past

teams.name: Asase
teams.meaning: Akan — 'the earth' — grounded, rooted in place

teams.name: Baobab
teams.meaning: The tree of life — resilient, long-lived, central to West African village life

teams.name: Kora
teams.meaning: 21-string West African harp — complex, melodic, built by hand

teams.name: Harmattan
teams.meaning: The dry season wind from the Sahara — relentless, transformative

teams.name: Zawadi
teams.meaning: Swahili — 'gift' — what you build for others

teams.name: Admin
teams.meaning: Operator account. Use admin password during login to also set admin flag.
